data.title: Five individuals admit guilt in $7.9M Dark Web drug scheme. FireBunnyUSA shipped 10,000+ drug packs, masking millions in crypto profits.
data.description: For a span of three years, an organization known as FireBunnyUSA conducted operations, managing to ship more than 10,000 packages containing illegal drugs. During this time, they utilized cryptocurrency as a means to conceal millions in profits generated from these activities.

data.title: Former UN Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon praises AiMOGA Robotics in Wuhu, China; visits as Chery Global ESG Honorary Advisor, on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Wuhu, China on October 24, 2025, the riverside city hosted a special visitor, former UN Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon, who now serves as Chery Global ESG Honorary Advisor. The city was filled with the scent of osmanthus as autumn progressed during his visit.

data.title: Pepsi National Battle of the Bands expands to Palm Beach County for 2026 MLK Weekend Celebration from Jan 15–18.
data.description: A weekend celebration in honor of MLK is scheduled to take place from January 15 to 18 throughout Palm Beach County. The Pepsi National Battle of the Bands (NBOTB) will be making its debut in South Florida, marking an expansion of its unique event that highlights the excellence of Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) through music and performances. The celebration promises an iconic experience, attracting a significant audience to witness the showcase of talent. The event is set to bring together a diverse group of participants and attendees, offering a platform to recognize and celebrate the cultural significance of HBCUs.

data.title: Global ice storage bins market set to grow at 4.27% CAGR from 2024 to 2030, with increased adoption of modular and portable solutions.
data.description: A report on the Ice Storage Bins Market for the period 2025-2030 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for ice storage bins is projected to experience a growth rate of 4.27% from 2024 to 2030. The industry has seen a trend towards utilizing modular and portable options in recent times as organizations aim to enhance efficiency. This shift has led to an increased demand for versatile ice storage solutions across various sectors.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper to report Q3 earnings, analysts expect 54 cents/share, revenue of $4.15 billion. Stock offers 3.34% yield.
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings on October 27, prior to market open. Analysts predict earnings per share of 54 cents, an increase from 51 cents reported last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to reach $4.15 billion, up from $3.89 billion in the previous year. JPMorgan analyst Andrea Teixeira reaffirmed an Overweight rating on the company on October 20, adjusting the price target from $39 to $36. Keurig Dr Pepper currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.34%, attracting attention from investors seeking potential gains. For further information, the full report is accessible on Benzinga’s website.

data.title: BiomEdit receives $2M from Bezos Earth Fund to develop AI model for methane reduction in cattle with partners MENDOTA, IL, Oct. 24, 2025, (PRNewswire).
data.description: A collaboration between Bioversity International USA and Yale University in GREENFIELD, Ind., announced on Oct. 24, 2025, aims to develop the Rumen Digital Twin. This innovative project will focus on creating a model to optimize climate-smart feed and microbiome interventions. The partnership will bring together experts to work on this cutting-edge technology that has the potential to revolutionize livestock farming practices. This initiative will not only enhance agricultural sustainability but also contribute to reducing greenhouse gas emissions. Stay tuned for updates on this groundbreaking endeavor.

data.title: IVI RMA NA to present 36 research papers at ASRM 2025, showcasing fertility care advancements; global meeting in Texas.
data.description: IVI RMA North America, a prominent fertility care and assisted reproduction provider based in Basking Ridge, N.J., is set to present 36 sessions at the American Society for Reproductive Medicine (ASRM) Annual Scientific Congress & Expo in San Antonio, Texas from October 25-29. This congress is a leading international event focusing on reproductive medicine, infertility, contraception, menopause, and embryology. The presentations and poster sessions aim to highlight cutting-edge advancements in the field.

data.title: Daimler Truck Financial Services and GEICO partner for Connected Insurance to help truckers save on premiums.
data.description: Daimler Truck Financial Services USA LLC (DTFS) and GEICO, a leading US insurer, have introduced Connected Insurance, a data-based insurance initiative to assist Freightliner and Western Star owner-operators and small fleets in reducing premiums and enhancing road safety. The program, managed by DTFS subsidiary Daimler Truck Insurance Agency LLC, aims to promote safer driving practices among truck drivers.

data.title: Booz Allen reports Q2 EPS of $1.49, sales at $2.89B (down 8.1%). Backlog at $40B, operating income $283M. Staff cut by 3,100.
data.description: Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corporation (NYSE: BAH) saw a drop in stock price following its fiscal second-quarter results announcement. The company's adjusted EPS for the quarter was $1.49, falling short of the analyst consensus of $1.51. Quarterly sales were reported at $2.89 billion, declining by 8.1% compared to the previous year and missing the expected $2.99 billion. The backlog grew by 2.9% to $40 billion, with a quarterly book-to-bill ratio of 1.7x. Organic revenue decreased by 4.7%. Quarterly operating income stood at $283 million, down from $549 million a year ago. The client staff headcount decreased by approximately 3,100 as of September 30. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital Corp. appoints Wes Levitt as CFO. NASDAQ: ATON. Building TON ecosystem.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, AlphaTON Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: ATON) based in New York, appointed Wes Levitt as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). AlphaTON, a digital asset treasury company focused on developing the TON ecosystem, made this important decision to lead the financial operations of the company. Wes Levitt takes on the CFO role immediately to contribute to AlphaTON's financial strategies and growth.

data.title: Solana (HSDT) partners with Helius and Twinstake for improved SOL staking, using Anchorage Digital Bank for custody.
data.description: Solana Company has formed partnerships with Helius and Twinstake to improve SOL staking services. The collaboration involves utilizing Anchorage Digital Bank for direct custody operations. This strategic move aims to bolster the staking services offered for SOL cryptocurrency.

data.title: ParaZero receives large order for Anti-Drone Systems from major defense corp. (Tier 1), boosting growth.
data.description: In Kfar Saba, Israel, on October 24, 2025, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) revealed securing a noteworthy order for its Counter-UAS DefendAir solutions from a top global defense corporation. ParaZero is leading in developing intelligent, autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems. This latest order signifies a significant milestone for the company, showcasing its growing prominence in the aerospace defense sector.

data.title: Buffalo Biodiesel partners with Verite Capital for $300M growth; Don Jones to become minority owner and chairman.
data.description: Buffalo's Biodiesel Inc. (BBD), a prominent used-cooking-oil recycler and renewable green energy fuel producer based in Buffalo, New York, revealed a significant capital and growth collaboration with Verite Capital Partners today. This partnership marks a crucial step forward for BBD in their efforts to expand and enhance their operations.

data.title: ChemDiv extends partnership with Mondego Bio on PTPN2 immuno-oncology program, following successful Series A.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in San Diego, it was reported that ChemDiv has prolonged its partnership with Mondego Bio for discovering and advancing an immuno-oncology program focusing on PTPN2. This extension comes after Mondego Bio's prosperous Series A funding round. The collaboration aims to enhance Mondego Bio's leading program with ChemDiv's expertise.
